title: Possible United States lineup to face Belgium in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
After advancing through the previous round, the United States faces one of its biggest challenges of the FIFA World Cup 2026 as it takes on Belgium in the Round of 16. Mauricio Pochettino's side is expected to field a balanced lineup, blending experience and energy in an effort to overcome one of the tournament's strongest teams.

In goal, Matt Freese is expected to start between the posts for the United States. The defensive line would feature Antonee Robinson, Chris Richards, Tim Ream, and Alex Freeman , a back line that will look to stay organized and contain Belgium's attacking threat.

Providing width and attacking support from the flank, Sergiño Dest is expected to operate as an attack-minded wing-back.

The midfield would be led by Tyler Adams , who is expected to provide balance and defensive stability, alongside Malik Tillman and Weston McKennie , two midfielders capable of winning possession and joining the attack. Out wide, Christian Pulisic would be the team's main creative force and one of the United States' biggest attacking weapons.

Up front, Folarin Balogun is expected to lead the line for the Americans. The striker will look to capitalize on the spaces created by Pulisic and the late runs from midfield as he aims to provide the goals in what promises to be a highly competitive matchup.

Matt Freese, Antonee Robinson, Chris Richards, Tim Ream, Alex Freeman, Sergiño Dest, Malik Tillman, Tyler Adams, Weston McKennie, Christian Pulisic, and Folarin Balogun.
